memberdef.argsstring: (XAVBuf_Pll *PllInstancePtr, u8 Pll, u8 CrossDomain, u8 ExtDividerCnt)
memberdef.name: XAVBuf_PllInitialize

briefdescription.para: This function initializes the parameters required to configure PLL.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the XAVBuf_Pll instance.
is the PLL chosen to be configured.
is the PLL chosen to be configured.
is the bool which is used to mention if the PLL outputs in other domain.
is number of external divider out of VCO.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if PLL is configured without an error. XST_FAILURE otherwise.
In order to avoid floating point usage we have a 16bit fractional fixed point arithmetic implementation

briefdescription.para: This function calculates the parameters which are required to configure PLL depending upon the requested frequency.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the XAVBuf_Pll instance
is the requested frequency to DP in Hz

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if parameters are calculated XST_FAILURE otherwise.
In order to avoid floating point usage we have a 16bit fractional fixed point arithmetic implementation

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset, u32 Mask, u32 Shift, u32 Data)
memberdef.name: XAVBuf_ReadModifyWriteReg

briefdescription.para: This function will Read modify and write into corresponding registers.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address to which the value has to be written.
is the relative offset from Base address.
is used to select the number of bits to be modified.
is the number bits to be shifted from LSB.
is the Data to be written.
is pointer to the XAVBuf_Pll instance.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if PLL is configured without an error. XST_FAILURE otherwise.

briefdescription.para: This function configures Configures external divider.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the XAVBuf_Pll instance.

briefdescription.para: This function calls API to calculate and configure PLL with desired frequency for Video.

parameterdescription.para: is the desired frequency in Hz.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if PLL is configured without an error. XST_FAILURE otherwise.
The Pll used is design specific.

briefdescription.para: This function calls API to calculate and configure PLL with desired frequency for Audio.

parameterdescription.para: is the desired frequency in Hz.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if PLL is configured without an error. XST_FAILURE otherwise.
The Pll used is design specific.

briefdescription.para: This file contains PLL configuring functions.

detaileddescription.para: These Functions calculates and configures the PLL depending on desired frequency.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 mh 06/24/17 Initial release. 2.1 tu 12/29/17 LPD and FPD offsets adjusted 2.6 rv 05/02/23 Added PLL macros
